import cachetools, inspect, textwrap
import cachetools as ct
import cachetools._cached as c
import cachetools._cachedmethod as cm
import cachetools.func as f
import cachetools.keys as k
for mod in [ct,c,cm,f,k]:
    print('\n###', mod.__name__, inspect.getsource(mod))

python3 - <<'PY'
import inspect, cachetools, cachetools._cached, cachetools._cachedmethod, cachetools.func, cachetools.keys
mods=[cachetools, cachetools._cached, cachetools._cachedmethod, cachetools.func, cachetools.keys]
for m in mods:
    p=inspect.getfile(m)
    print('FILE',p)
    print(open(p).read())

import urllib.request
for path in [
'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tkem/cachetools/v6.1.0/src/cachetools/__init__.py',
'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tkem/cachetools/v6.1.0/src/cachetools/_cached.py',
